_publications._publicationTitle: Potential clinical use of azacitidine and MEK inhibitor combination therapy in PTPN11-mutated juvenile myelomonocytic leukemia
_publications._context: Shp2 E76K/+ murine model used to evaluate azacitidine + PD-901 (MEK inhibitor) combination therapy for PTPN11-mutated JMML. RNA-seq data deposited in GEO GSE211278 (Synapse syn74607259).

basicInfo.description: Heterozygous Ptpn11 E76K germline knock-in mouse model of juvenile myelomonocytic leukemia (JMML). Encodes a gain-of-function SHP2 E76K variant that hyperactivates the Ras/MAPK pathway, recapitulating PTPN11-mutated JMML.
